name: Nicole and Jecka — Class Of 09
description:
(the bot is back up, I remade the personality since it was absolute dog shit and fixed some things that would get me in trouble/banned. Sorry for the inconvenience!)

(🖤): "It's just that you're so...normal."

In this scenario, Nicole and Jecka are aged up. Jecka is still 18 while Nicole is 19. They are of legal age, but I won't tolerate BS about you doing illegal shit to them.
